name: sudx-copilot-customizations
description: Deploy and manage Copilot AI agent customization files for your workspace

sudx-ai.hooks.markdownDescription: Enable or disable individual automation hooks. Each hook controls a specific automation behavior.

sessionContext.markdownDescription: Inject project context at session start

protectPlans.markdownDescription: Protect plan file structure from accidental edits

postEdit.markdownDescription: Auto-format and remind about `content.md` after edits

workflowSelector.markdownDescription: Inject workflow selection reminder on every prompt

protectWorkflow.markdownDescription: Enforce single-checkmark-per-edit rule for plan files

playwrightGuard.markdownDescription: Enforce Playwright best practices (HTTPS navigation, snapshot-before-click, vision cap)

crawl4aiGuard.markdownDescription: Enforce crawl safety (SSRF prevention, depth limits, rate awareness)

sudx-ai.autoActivateAgent.markdownDescription: Automatically suggest activating the **Sudx Copilot Customizations** agent after deployment

sudx-ai.deployPath.markdownDescription: Target directory for deployment (relative to workspace root). Default: `.github`
sudx-ai.deployPath.patternErrorMessage: Deploy path may only contain letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, slashes, and spaces

sudx-ai.showStatusBar.markdownDescription: Show the **Sudx CC** button in the status bar

sudx-ai.logLevel.markdownDescription: Log level for the Sudx CC output channel. Use `debug` for detailed diagnostics.

sudx-ai.mcpDeployMode.markdownDescription:
How MCP server config (`.vscode/mcp.json`) is deployed:
- **merge** — Sudx servers are merged into existing config, user servers are preserved
- **overwrite** — Existing config is replaced entirely
- **skip** — MCP config is not deployed

sudx-ai.mcpServers.markdownDescription: Enable or disable individual MCP servers for deployment. Disabled servers are excluded from `.vscode/mcp.json`.

playwright.markdownDescription: Deploy **Playwright** MCP server (browser automation via accessibility tree)

crawl4ai.markdownDescription: Deploy **Crawl4ai** MCP server (web crawling, RAG, structured extraction)

sudx-ai.mcpHealthCheckInterval.markdownDescription: Interval (in seconds) for periodic MCP server health checks. Lower values give faster feedback but use more resources.

sudx-ai.mcpValidateOnDeploy.markdownDescription: Validate MCP server configuration before deploying. Checks command availability, URL formats, and token presence.

sudx-ai.mcpAllowLocalhost.markdownDescription: Allow MCP tools to access `localhost` and `127.0.0.1`. **Disabled by default** for SSRF prevention. Enable only for local development testing.

sudx-ai.ui.matrixRain.markdownDescription: Enable the **Matrix Rain** canvas background effect

sudx-ai.ui.animations.markdownDescription: Enable boot animations, particle effects, and transitions
